FlavourText.original:
They believed themselves driven by necessity,
but that desperation made them monstrous.
FlavourText.zh_cn:
他们自认为是被逼无奈，
但正是这种绝望把他们变成了恶魔。
FlavourText.zh_tw:
他們曾深信自己是逼不得已，
但那份絕望使他們如狼似虎。

group.original: [Desecration makes this item unstable|Desecration makes this item unstable]

translation.zh_cn: [Desecration makes this item unstable|渎灵会使物品不稳定。]
translation.zh_tw: [Desecration makes this item unstable|褻瀆此物品會使其變得不穩定]

group.original:
Glorifying the defilement of {0} souls in tribute to Amanamu
Passives in radius are Conquered by the Abyssals

translation.zh_cn:
赞颂以阿曼娜姆之名亵渎的 {0} 个灵魂，
范围内的天赋被深渊抑制
translation.zh_tw:
以 {0} 個玷污的靈魂榮耀阿姆納姆之名
半徑範圍內的天賦受深淵族征服

group.original: Conquered Attribute Passive Skills also grant {0} to Tribute

translation.zh_cn: 被抑制的属性天赋技能还会提供 {0} 贡品
translation.zh_tw: 被征服的能力值天賦技能也會賦予 {0} 貢禮
